title: Item Card Notes - Add Reminder Feature
excerpt:

posts.author: BontificusRex (Bonnie Gunter)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Currently, in the Item Card, the notes are there, but there is no reminder feature. It lives in the Updates and requires more clicks to get to it. It would be user friendly to have this also available through the Notes on the Item card to reduce steps/clicks it takes to get to this needed feature.

What are you trying to achieve

Less navigating away from the Item Card. Making the reminders feature more user friendly and easy to access with the notes.
